query_string:
/* 個店予測 */
with proto__forecast as (
  select
    business_datetime
    , sum(pred_q0_5) as prt__value__q0_5
    , sum(pred_q0_6) as prt__value__q0_6
    , sum(pred_q0_7) as prt__value__q0_7
    , sum(pred_q0_8) as prt__value__q0_8
    , sum(pred_q0_9) as prt__value__q0_9
    , sum(pred_q_mixed) as prt__value__q_mixed
  from
    _l2_demand_forecast_gcp.tft_result_latest_main_0325
  group by
    1
)

/* 既存予測 */
, current__forecast as (
  select
    forecast_datetime as business_datetime
    , sum(forecast_treatment_value) as crt__value
  from
    _l2_demand_forecast_gcp.prep_forecast_treatment
  where
    processing_date = '2026-02-02'
  group by
    1
)

/* 実績 */
, result as (
  select
    result_datetime as business_datetime
    , business_week
    , sum(result_treatment_value) as result__value
    , sum(avg_result_treatment_value) as result__value__avg
  from
    _l2_demand_forecast_gcp.prep_result_treatment
  where
    processing_date between '2026-02-09' and '2026-03-16'
  group by
    1,2
)

, merged as (
  select
    business_datetime
    , business_week
    , result__value
    , prt__value__q0_5
    , prt__value__q0_6
    , prt__value__q0_7
    , prt__value__q0_8
    , prt__value__q0_9
    , prt__value__q_mixed
    , crt__value
  from
    result
    left join proto__forecast using (business_datetime)
    left join current__forecast using (business_datetime)
)


select
  business_week
  , s_property_id
  , sum(result__value) as result__value
  , sum(prt__value__q0_5) as prt__value__q0_5
  , sum(prt__value__q0_6) as prt__value__q0_6
  , sum(prt__value__q0_7) as prt__value__q0_7
  , sum(prt__value__q0_8) as prt__value__q0_8
  , sum(prt__value__q0_9) as prt__value__q0_9
  , sum(prt__value__q_mixed) as prt__value__q_mixed
  , sum(crt__value) as crt__value

  , 1.0 * sum(prt__value__q0_5) / sum(result__value) as prd_rate__prt_q0_5
  , 1.0 * sum(prt__value__q0_6) / sum(result__value) as prd_rate__prt_q0_6
  , 1.0 * sum(prt__value__q0_7) / sum(result__value) as prd_rate__prt_q0_7
  , 1.0 * sum(prt__value__q0_8) / sum(result__value) as prd_rate__prt_q0_8
  , 1.0 * sum(prt__value__q0_9) / sum(result__value) as prd_rate__prt_q0_9
  , 1.0 * sum(prt__value__q_mixed) / sum(result__value) as prd_rate__prt_q_mixed
  , 1.0 * sum(crt__value) / sum(result__value) as prd_rate__crt
from
  merged
group by
  1,2
